zh.Melton Mowbray, Melton Borough, Leiceste: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Fenton於1476年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓時，他的父親Ralph Fenton26歲，母親Dorothy De Staunton18歲。他於1501年與Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1536年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Fenton于1476年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓时，他的父亲Ralph Fenton26岁，母亲Dorothy De Staunton18岁。他于1501年与Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1536年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Fenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, in Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Northumberland, Staffordshire, and Nottinghamshire, so called from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

Irish: English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Fionnachta or Ó Fiachna ‘descendant of Fiachna’, an old personal name Anglicized as Feighney and sometimes mistranslated as Hunt (see Fee 1 and Finnerty ).
Scottish: habitational name from Fenton in East Lothian.

variants.name: Hunt
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle English hunte ‘hunter, huntsman’ (Old English hunta). The term was used not only of the hunting on horseback of game such as stags and wild boars, which in the Middle Ages was a pursuit restricted to the ranks of the nobility, but also to much humbler forms of pursuit such as bird catching and poaching for food. The word seems also to have been used as an Old English personal name and to have survived into the Middle Ages as an occasional personal name. Compare Huntington and Huntley .
Irish: adopted for various Irish surnames containing or thought to contain the Gaelic element fiadhach ‘hunt’; for example Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) and Ó Fiachna (see Fenton ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Hundt  .

variants.name: Fantom
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English fantom, fainton ‘apparition, ghost’. There has been some confusion with Fenton .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Fenton was born in 1476, in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Fenton, was 26 and his mother, Dorothy De Staunton, was 18. He married Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh in 1501, in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1536, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Fenton est né en 1476, à Coleorton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Fenton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Dorothy De Staunton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh en 1501, à Coleorton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1536, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fentonが1476年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコーレオルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph Fentonは26歳，母Dorothy De Stauntonは18歳であった。1501年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコーレオルトンでLady Anne Catherine De Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1536年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fenton(이)가 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 콜리르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Fenton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy De Staunton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 콜리르턴에서 Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Fenton родился в 1476 г. в местности колеортон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Fenton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy De Staunton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh в 1501 г. в местности колеортон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1536 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
